structure_model_status: Public plant structures available; 9GRR is Arabidopsis FatA bound to cinmethylin itself (verified via RCSB data API)
mutation_evidence_status: Primary-source verified: R171K/Q/I/M (FAT A) and P192R (FAT B) in Alopecurus myosuroides
next_action: Align A. myosuroides FatA to 9GRR to confirm R171/Arg176 correspondence; obtain full PDF of Lolium rigidum metabolic-resistance paper (10.1002/ps.6947)
notes: Not weed-evolved -- site-directed mutants guided by molecular docking, tested in vitro (Wagner et al. 2026 bioRxiv, bachelor thesis, not peer-reviewed). Real NTSR (metabolic) cinmethylin resistance does exist in L. rigidum populations; target-site resistance does not yet. See phase5_risk_table.csv for full mutation data.

target_moa_evidence: Tetflupyrolimet/DHODH target literature identified; primary PNAS paper read directly
structure_model_status: Rice (Oryza sativa) DHODH-tetflupyrolimet structure exists per Kang et al. 2023 PNAS but is NOT publicly deposited (no PDB ID given); AlphaFold AtDHODH model also internal-only
structure_ids_or_model_route: No public accession -- internal Syngenta structure + internal AlphaFold model (At5g23300)
mutation_evidence_status: Primary-source verified: G198E and A141T in Arabidopsis thaliana (EMS mutagenesis lines 45R1/60R1)
next_action: Monitor for a future public deposition of the rice DHODH-tetflupyrolimet structure or an independent plant DHODH structure/model
notes: Not weed-evolved -- EMS chemical mutagenesis screen of ~24,000 seeds (Kang et al. 2023 PNAS, DOI 10.1073/pnas.2313197120). G198E confirmed causal via transgenic re-creation. See phase5_risk_table.csv for full mutation data.
